message.content:
Ingest contract `tafi_2025`. Files are at:
- PDF: /mnt/session/uploads/input/tafi_2025/Borrador de EF 2025 - Financiera Tafi - MICI.pdf
- CSV: /mnt/session/uploads/input/tafi_2025/Cartera Total TAFI.csv

Follow your contracted ingestion procedure. Write outputs under /mnt/session/out/tafi_2025/. Return the final envelope only.
